ITEM 15. EXHIBITS AND FINANCIAL STATEMENT SCHEDULES
[DATE_TIME] FORM 10-K 97
[DATE_TIME] FORM 10-K 98
* Management contract or compensatory plan or arrangement.
The Exhibits filed herewith do not include certain instruments with respect to long-term debt of NIKE and its subsidiaries, inasmuch as the total amount of debt authorized under any such instrument does not exceed 10 percent of the total assets of NIKE and its subsidiaries on a consolidated basis. NIKE agrees, pursuant to [DATE_TIME]) of Regulation S-K, that it will furnish a copy of any such instrument to the SEC upon request.
Upon written request to Investor Relations, NIKE, Inc., One [PERSON], [LOCATION], [LOCATION] 97005-6453, NIKE will furnish shareholders with a copy of any Exhibit upon payment of [SALARY] per page, which represents our reasonable expenses in furnishing Exhibits.
[DATE_TIME] FORM 10-K 99
SCHEDULE II - VALUATION AND QUALIFYING ACCOUNTS
(1)
Amounts included in this column primarily relate to foreign currency translation.
(2)
As a result of the adoption of ASC Topic 606 during [DATE_TIME], an asset for the estimated cost of inventory for expected products returns is now recognized separately from the liability for sales returns reserves, which is presented above.
[DATE_TIME] FORM 10-K 100
ITEM 16. FORM 10-K SUMMARY
None.
[DATE_TIME] FORM 10-K 101
Consent of Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm
We hereby consent to the incorporation by reference in the Registration Statement on Form S-8 (Nos. 033-63995, 333-63581, 333-63583, 333-68864, 333-68886, 333-71660, [DATE_TIME], 333-117059, [DATE_TIME], 333-164248, 333-171647, [DATE_TIME], 333-208900 and 333-215439) and the Registration Statement on Form S-3 (No. 333-232770) of NIKE, Inc. of our report dated [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME] relating to the financial statements and financial statement schedule and the effectiveness of internal control over financial reporting, which appears in this Form 10-K.
/s/ PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP
[LOCATION], [LOCATION]
[DATE_TIME] FORM 10-K 102
SIGNATURES
Pursuant to the requirements of Section 13 or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of [DATE_TIME], the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized.
Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of [DATE_TIME], as amended, this report has been signed below by the following persons on behalf of the registrant and in the capacities and on the dates indicated.
[DATE_TIME] FORM 10-K 103
